baselines.ideal_answer_shape: End-to-end delivery mentorship plan with requirement intake, decomposition, implementation planning, testing strategy, debugging method, review, deployment readiness, definition of done, and source-apply stop boundary.
likely_local_model_failure_modes: Does not mentor why steps exist.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask explicitly for a junior-engineer mentoring plan from requirement intake through deployment readiness and stop conditions.

baselines.ideal_answer_shape: Feature delivery coaching plan that preserves existing behavior, asks about export/filtering source of truth, includes data-safety and file-size risks, tests, rollout, observability, and rollback.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask to preserve existing JSON export and call out export-size, permissions, and rollout checks.

baselines.ideal_answer_shape: Archive/restore delivery plan that separates soft-delete state, list filtering, admin restore, authorization, auditability, tests, rollback, and deployment readiness.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask for server-side authorization, restore semantics, and list-filter regression checks.

baselines.ideal_answer_shape: Debugging mentorship plan that teaches reproduce, inspect logs/request IDs, compare staging config/data, trace request flow, isolate dependency failures, and verify fix with regression.
safety_boundaries: Do not guess root cause without evidence.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask for an evidence-first debugging workflow with staging logs, config comparison, and verification loop.

baselines.ideal_answer_shape: Firm quality-gate mentorship response that recommends against skipping required regression, offers scope reduction or safer alternatives, and names risks and minimum verification bar.
likely_local_model_failure_modes: Does not offer smaller safe alternatives.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask for the minimum safe verification bar and smaller delivery alternatives under deadline pressure.

baselines.ideal_answer_shape: Scheduled-report delivery plan with decomposition across model/API/job/email/UI if applicable, time zones, retries/idempotency, observability, tests, rollback, and deployment readiness.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask for independently testable tasks plus retries, idempotency, and monitoring.

baselines.ideal_answer_shape: Code-quality mentorship response that rejects parallel implementations, teaches characterization tests and consolidation, separates readability debt, and defines safe review and delivery gates.
safety_boundaries: Do not accept duplication as final.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask to preserve one code path and separate debt remediation from feature delivery.

baselines.ideal_answer_shape: Deployment-readiness checklist showing implementation and unit tests are not enough; requires CI/regression, config/migrations, observability, rollback, docs, live verification, and definition of done.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask for CI, rollback, observability, docs, and live verification before done.

baselines.ideal_answer_shape: Retry-safety holdout coaching plan that rejects wrapping the whole handler, teaches idempotency and duplicate-charge risk, narrows retry scope, and requires evidence, tests, rollback, and deployment readiness.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask specifically for idempotency, retry boundaries, provider error classes, and duplicate side-effect risk.

baselines.ideal_answer_shape: Bulk-import holdout delivery plan covering parsing, validation, preview, partial failures, permissions, audit trail, size limits, background processing, tests, observability, rollback, and deployment readiness.
likely_local_model_failure_modes: Makes a synchronous large upload plan without risk controls.
baselines.prompt_tightening_suggestion: Ask for preview, partial failure behavior, permission checks, auditability, and size/background-processing boundaries.
